creator: igoro@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tomoaki AOKI from comment #9)
The old /usr/tests of 13.x are in sync (i.e. runnable) with Kyua from its base and with the old Kyua version from the port. The agreement was not to touch it anyhow to keep it so. Meanwhile, stable/14 started receiving new tests MFC'ed from main, they require the latest Kyua version which is also MFC'ed.

Yes, it looks like we have a way. I guess, after the confirmation of the approach from bapt@, you could propose the similar patches for devel/gcli, mail/mlmmj, sysutils/zogftw, and x11-wm/dwm ports. Let me know if you need help with time & resources for that.

Again, many thanks for the help.
